idea-plugin.name: FeignHelper
idea-plugin.description:
FeignHelper

A modern navigation assistant for Spring Cloud OpenFeign, Spring MVC and the Spring 6 @HttpExchange declarative HTTP client, built on top of IntelliJ Platform 2.x in pure Kotlin.

Features

  • Bidirectional gutter navigation between @FeignClient / @HttpExchange interfaces and @RestController methods.
  • One-click path copy — right-click any gutter arrow to copy the resolved endpoint path.
  • Spring configuration aware — automatically resolves server.servlet.context-path, spring.mvc.servlet.path, application-{profile}.yml and ${var:default} placeholders.
  • Java & Kotlin sources, courtesy of UAST.
  • Project-level caching with incremental refresh on PSI and Spring configuration changes.
  • Bilingual UI — English & Simplified Chinese bundle.

Compatibility

IntelliJ IDEA 2024.3+ (build 243+). Requires the bundled Java and Kotlin plugins.

Links

  • Source on GitHub
  • Changelog
  • Report an issue

简介（中文）

FeignHelper 是面向 Spring Cloud OpenFeign、Spring MVC 与 Spring 6 @HttpExchange 声明式 HTTP 客户端的现代化导航助手，基于 IntelliJ Platform 2.x、Kotlin 编写。

  • @FeignClient / @HttpExchange 与 @RestController 双向行内导航
  • gutter 箭头右键复制解析后的接口路径到剪贴板
  • 自动解析 application.yml / application-{profile}.yml 与 ${var:default} 占位符
  • 同时支持 Java 与 Kotlin（基于 UAST）
  • 中英双语界面
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.3

  • New tool window on the right side: browse all Controller endpoints and all Feign / HttpExchange endpoints in two tabs.
  • Endpoints are grouped by class, sorted by URL + HTTP method, and filterable by URL, method, or class name.
  • Double-click/Enter jumps to source; right-click copies URL or navigates to the counterpart.
  • Lists refresh automatically when PSI or Spring configuration changes.

1.0.2

  • Gutter icons are now rendered only when a counterpart exists: a @FeignClient / @HttpExchange method shows the icon only when a matching @RestController method is found, and vice versa.
  • The cache-only counterpart check keeps LineMarker rendering fast and avoids blocking the EDT with project-wide scans.
  • After asynchronous cache warm-up on project open, the daemon is notified so matched icons appear immediately.

1.0.1

  • Fix a PSI stale-reference / leak risk caused by LineMarkerInfo strongly holding PsiMethod; the source method is now re-resolved from the latest anchor on click.
  • Run the fallback project-wide scan inside a cancelable background progress instead of on the EDT, preventing UI freezes on first click.
  • Guard BilateralMappingCacheService against invalid PsiMethod inputs to avoid PsiInvalidElementAccessException.
  • Always render the gutter icon when a method is applicable, so freshly edited methods can immediately trigger the fallback scan.
  • Show a balloon notification when no matching endpoint is found, so clicks no longer fail silently.

1.0.0

  • Initial public release.
  • Bidirectional gutter navigation between @FeignClient / @HttpExchange and @RestController.
  • Right-click gutter to copy the resolved endpoint path with balloon notification.
  • Java + Kotlin source support via UAST.
  • application-{profile}.yml resolution and ${var:default} placeholders.
  • Project-level caching with @Service(Service.Level.PROJECT); asynchronous warm-up through ProjectActivity.
  • English & Simplified Chinese bundle.
